title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices for protecting data from cyber threats. The course is offered through edX and Harvard's extension and summer schools with accompanying communities and resources.
